What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

fill out the below form, reach out to you within 24 hours, Lamaze childbirth education, prenatal and postpartum yoga, postpartum belly binding, newborn photography, 50% deposit at contract signing

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Keep intake-form replies, consults, and package fit in one queue so the 24-hour response window stays on track.
  • Track prenatal visits, Lamaze/yoga enrollments, and birth-day on-call timing without juggling ConvertKit, email, and paper contracts.
  • Keep deposit paid, 36-week balance, belly-binding, and photography add-ons attached to the same family record.
